title: potentilla anserina subvar. longissima
intro: Potentilla anserina subvar. longissima, also known as Long-stalked Crowfoot or Long-stalked Silver Cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Potentilla anserina subvar. longissima have been traditionally used to address digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as to boost the immune system and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in natural remedies.
